sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current block position after 3 LEFT moves
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

def find_block_positions(ascii_lines):
    o_positions = []
    b_positions = []
    for r in range(len(ascii_lines)):
        for c in range(len(ascii_lines[r])):
            if ascii_lines[r][c] == 'O':
                o_positions.append((r, c))
            elif ascii_lines[r][c] == 'b' and 40 <= r <= 52:
                b_positions.append((r, c))
    return o_positions, b_positions

o_pos, b_pos = find_block_positions(ascii_lines)
print(f"Current O: rows {min(r for r,c in o_pos)}-{max(r for r,c in o_pos)}, cols {min(c for r,c in o_pos)}-{max(c for r,c in o_pos)}")
print(f"Current b: rows {min(r for r,c in b_pos)}-{max(r for r,c in b_pos)}, cols {min(c for r,c in b_pos)}-{max(c for r,c in b_pos)}")

# Show the area around the blocks
print("\n=== Around blocks ===")
for r in range(38, 47):
    print(f"{r}: {ascii_lines[r][24:45]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me check all transitions to understand what happened
for i, t in enumerate(transitions):
    before_o = []
    after_o = []
    before_ascii = t.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    after_ascii = t.after_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    for r in range(len(before_ascii)):
        for c in range(len(before_ascii[r])):
            if before_ascii[r][c] == 'O':
                before_o.append((r, c))
            if after_ascii[r][c] == 'O':
                after_o.append((r, c))
    o_before_cols = sorted(set(c for r,c in before_o)) if before_o else []
    o_after_cols = sorted(set(c for r,c in after_o)) if after_o else []
    print(f"Transition {i} ({t.action}): O cols {o_before_cols} -> {o_after_cols}")

# Current state check
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"\nCurrent step: {current_frame.step}")

# Try RIGHT to see if blocks still move
action(['RIGHT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
